references.passiveText: The {enemy_type_plural} who did this have struck before. Other settlements have suffered the same way.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} in {location} dealt with the same crew six months ago. Lost half their harvest to a raid, and the guards never caught anyone. If we could coordinate with them, share what we know about patrol routes and hiding spots, we might finally corner these raiders for good.

references.passiveText: A traveler passing through claims to have seen the raiders' main encampment.
references.triggerTopicLabel: The traveler who saw the camp
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} stumbled across a well-hidden camp {location_hint} while cutting through the backcountry. Said it was bigger than expected: fortified, organized, with lookouts posted on every approach. If that's where the raiders operate from, taking it out would cripple their ability to strike at any settlement in the region.
